departments.title: Critical Care
departments.short_description: Intensive care and emergency medical services for life-threatening conditions.
departments.long_description: Our Critical Care department provides comprehensive intensive care for patients with life-threatening conditions. We have state-of-the-art ICUs, CCUs, and emergency response systems. Our team of intensivists, critical care nurses, and support staff work round the clock to provide the highest level of care for critically ill patients. We are equipped with advanced monitoring systems, ventilators, and life-support equipment to handle the most complex medical emergencies.

departments.title: Cardiology
departments.short_description: Advanced heart care with minimally invasive procedures for cardiovascular diseases.
departments.long_description: Our Cardiology department is a center of excellence for comprehensive heart care. We offer a full spectrum of cardiac services from preventive cardiology to complex interventional procedures. Our team of interventional cardiologists, cardiac surgeons, and support staff use the latest technology to diagnose and treat all types of heart conditions. We have a state-of-the-art catheterization laboratory, echocardiography suite, and cardiac rehabilitation center.

departments.title: Diagnostics & Imaging
departments.short_description: Comprehensive diagnostic imaging including X-ray, CT Scan, MRI, and Ultrasound.
departments.long_description: Our Diagnostics & Imaging department is equipped with the latest medical imaging technology. We provide accurate and timely diagnostic services to support clinical decision-making. Our team of radiologists, technicians, and support staff ensure high-quality imaging with minimal radiation exposure. We offer a full range of services from routine X-rays to advanced MRI and CT scans.

departments.title: In-Patient Care
departments.short_description: Comfortable and professional care for patients requiring overnight stays.
departments.long_description: Our In-Patient Care department provides comfortable and compassionate care for patients requiring hospital admission. We offer a range of accommodation options from general wards to deluxe suites. Our dedicated team of physicians, nurses, and support staff ensure round-the-clock medical care, comfort, and safety for all admitted patients. We focus on creating a healing environment that promotes recovery and well-being.

departments.title: Out-Patient Care
departments.short_description: Specialized consultations and treatments without hospital admission.
departments.long_description: Our Out-Patient Care department provides high-quality medical consultations and treatments without the need for hospital admission. We have a team of specialist doctors across various disciplines available for consultation. Our OPD features comfortable waiting areas, multiple consultation rooms, and integrated diagnostic services. We offer online appointment booking and digital health records for patient convenience.

departments.title: Surgery & OT
departments.short_description: Modern Operation Theaters for major and minor surgical procedures.
departments.long_description: Our Surgery department features modern operation theaters equipped with advanced technology for all types of surgical procedures. We perform both major and minor surgeries using traditional and minimally invasive techniques. Our surgical team includes experienced surgeons, anesthesiologists, and operation theater technicians who ensure patient safety and optimal outcomes. We maintain the highest standards of sterility and infection control.

departments.title: Pain Management
departments.short_description: Specialized care for chronic and acute pain relief.
departments.long_description: Our Pain Management department provides comprehensive care for patients suffering from acute and chronic pain. We use a multidisciplinary approach combining medication, interventional procedures, physical therapy, and psychological support. Our pain specialists work closely with patients to develop personalized treatment plans that address the root cause of pain and improve quality of life.

departments.title: Skin & Aesthetics
departments.short_description: Dermatological treatments and advanced aesthetic procedures.
departments.long_description: Our Dermatology department offers comprehensive care for all skin, hair, and nail conditions. We combine medical dermatology with advanced aesthetic treatments to provide complete skin care solutions. Our team of dermatologists and cosmetic specialists use the latest technology for diagnosis and treatment of various skin conditions. We offer both medical treatments for skin diseases and cosmetic procedures for aesthetic enhancement.

services.title: Emergency and Trauma Care
services.short_description: 24/7 immediate medical response for acute illnesses and traumatic injuries.
services.long_description: Our Emergency and Trauma department is equipped with state-of-the-art life-saving technology and staffed by specialized physicians and nurses. We provide rapid assessment, intervention, and stabilization for critical conditions. Our team is trained to handle mass casualties, cardiac emergencies, stroke symptoms, severe injuries, and other life-threatening situations with minimal waiting time. We follow the 'Golden Hour' protocol to ensure timely intervention for trauma patients.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment for emergency services?
faqs.answer: No, our emergency department operates 24/7 and accepts walk-in patients. In critical situations, call our ambulance service immediately.

faqs.question: What should I bring to the emergency department?
faqs.answer: Please bring your ID card, insurance information, list of current medications, and any relevant medical records.

faqs.question: How long will I wait in the emergency department?
faqs.answer: Wait times vary based on the severity of conditions. Critical patients are seen immediately, while non-urgent cases may have minimal waiting time.

services.title: Critical Care Services (ICU/CCU)
services.short_description: Intensive monitoring and treatment for life-threatening conditions.
services.long_description: Our Critical Care Unit provides 1:1 nursing care and advanced life support for patients who are hemodynamically unstable. Equipped with advanced monitoring systems, ventilators, and crash carts, our ICU team is trained to handle severe medical emergencies and post-operative complications. We have separate ICUs for medical, surgical, and cardiac patients.

faqs.question: What is visiting policy in ICU?
faqs.answer: Limited visiting hours (30 minutes, twice daily) to ensure patient rest and prevent infections. Special exceptions for critical situations.

faqs.question: How long do patients stay in ICU?
faqs.answer: Stays vary from 1-2 days to several weeks depending on the severity of the condition and response to treatment.

faqs.question: Can family members stay with the patient?
faqs.answer: Due to the critical nature of care, overnight stays are not permitted. However, designated waiting areas are available for families.

services.title: Cath-Lab Services
services.short_description: Advanced cardiac intervention and diagnostic imaging for heart conditions.
services.long_description: Our Catheterization Laboratory (Cath-Lab) provides minimally invasive procedures to diagnose and treat cardiovascular diseases, including angioplasty, stenting, and coronary angiography. Equipped with the latest imaging technology, our lab ensures precise diagnosis and effective treatment of heart conditions with reduced recovery time and minimal discomfort. We perform both diagnostic and interventional procedures.

faqs.question: What is a coronary angiogram?
faqs.answer: A coronary angiogram is a procedure that uses contrast dye and X-rays to see how blood flows through the arteries in your heart.

faqs.question: How long does a cath-lab procedure take?
faqs.answer: Most procedures take 30-60 minutes, but preparation and recovery time may add 2-4 hours total.

faqs.question: Is the procedure painful?
faqs.answer: Local anesthesia is used at the catheter insertion site. You may feel pressure but not pain during the procedure.

services.title: Radiology Services
services.short_description: Comprehensive diagnostic imaging including X-ray, CT Scan, and Ultrasound.
services.long_description: We offer a full range of imaging services to support accurate diagnosis. Our department features high-resolution digital imaging equipment managed by expert radiologists. From routine X-rays to advanced MRI and CT scans, we provide precise imaging results with quick turnaround times to aid in effective treatment planning. We follow strict safety protocols to minimize radiation exposure.

faqs.question: Is radiology safe during pregnancy?
faqs.answer: Most radiology procedures use minimal radiation. However, always inform your doctor if you are pregnant or suspect pregnancy for necessary precautions.

faqs.question: How long does a CT scan take?
faqs.answer: A typical CT scan takes 10-30 minutes depending on the body part being examined.

faqs.question: When will I get my reports?
faqs.answer: Preliminary reports are available within 2 hours, and final reports within 24 hours.

services.title: Optical Diagnostics Services
services.short_description: Comprehensive eye examinations and vision correction diagnostics.
services.long_description: Advanced optical care including glaucoma screening, retinal check-ups, and precise vision testing to ensure optimal eye health. Our ophthalmology department uses cutting-edge diagnostic equipment for early detection of eye diseases and vision problems. We offer comprehensive eye examinations for all age groups.

faqs.question: How often should I get my eyes checked?
faqs.answer: Adults should have a comprehensive eye exam every 1-2 years. Diabetics and those with eye conditions need annual checks.

faqs.question: Does the test hurt?
faqs.answer: No, all diagnostic tests are non-invasive and painless.

faqs.question: Do I need to dilate my pupils?
faqs.answer: For comprehensive eye exams, pupil dilation may be recommended for better visualization of the retina.

services.title: In-Patient Services
services.short_description: Comfortable and professional care for patients requiring overnight stays.
services.long_description: Our in-patient facilities range from general wards to private suites, ensuring constant monitoring and care from our dedicated medical staff during your recovery. Each room is designed for patient comfort with modern amenities, nurse call systems, and regular physician visits. We provide comprehensive care including meals, medications, nursing support, and rehabilitation services.

faqs.question: Can family members stay overnight?
faqs.answer: Yes, attendants are allowed in private and deluxe rooms. Semi-private rooms have limited visitor hours.

faqs.question: Are meals included?
faqs.answer: Yes, all in-patients receive customized meals based on their dietary requirements.

faqs.question: What amenities are provided?
faqs.answer: TV, nurse call system, adjustable bed, bedside locker, and attached bathroom are provided in all room categories.

services.title: Out-Patient Services
services.short_description: Specialized consultations and treatments without the need for hospital admission.
services.long_description: Providing access to specialists across various medical disciplines for diagnosis, follow-up care, and minor procedures on a walk-in or appointment basis. Our OPD features comfortable waiting areas, multiple consultation rooms, and integrated diagnostic services for a seamless healthcare experience. We offer online appointment booking and telemedicine consultations.

faqs.question: Do I need a referral for a specialist?
faqs.answer: Most specialists can be consulted directly. Some insurance plans may require a primary care referral.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book online through our website, call our appointment desk, or walk in during OPD hours.

faqs.question: What is the consultation fee?
faqs.answer: Consultation fees vary by specialist. Please contact our appointment desk for specific pricing.

services.timing: Monday - Saturday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM | Sunday: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM

services.title: OT and Surgical Services
services.short_description: Modern Operation Theaters for major and minor surgical procedures.
services.long_description: Our surgical suites are designed to maintain the highest standards of sterility and safety, catering to orthopedic, general, and specialized surgeries. Each OT is equipped with laminar airflow systems, advanced anesthesia workstations, and high-definition surgical cameras for minimally invasive procedures. We perform both elective and emergency surgeries.

faqs.question: What is the recovery time after surgery?
faqs.answer: Recovery time varies by procedure. Minor surgeries may need 1-2 days, while major surgeries can require weeks of recovery.

faqs.question: Is minimally invasive surgery available?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer laparoscopic and keyhole surgeries for many procedures with faster recovery.

faqs.question: What is the pre-surgery preparation?
faqs.answer: You will receive detailed instructions including fasting, medication adjustments, and pre-operative tests.

services.timing: Monday - Saturday: 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM | Emergency Surgeries: 24/7

services.title: Pain Management Services
services.short_description: Specialized care for chronic and acute pain relief.
services.long_description: Interdisciplinary approaches to manage pain through therapy, medication, and advanced interventional techniques to improve quality of life. Our pain management specialists work together to create personalized treatment plans addressing the root cause of your pain. We offer both pharmacological and non-pharmacological treatments.

faqs.question: How long does pain management treatment take?
faqs.answer: Treatment duration varies based on condition. Some patients see improvement in weeks, while chronic conditions may need ongoing management.

faqs.question: Are injections painful?
faqs.answer: Local anesthesia is used to minimize discomfort. Most patients tolerate procedures well.

faqs.question: Do I need a referral?
faqs.answer: Some insurance plans require a referral from your primary care physician. Please check with your insurance provider.

services.title: Skin & Aesthetics Clinic
services.short_description: Dermatological treatments and advanced aesthetic procedures.
services.long_description: Expert dermatological care for skin conditions alongside modern aesthetic treatments for skin rejuvenation and cosmetic enhancement. Our clinic offers medical dermatology for conditions like acne, eczema, and psoriasis, as well as cosmetic procedures including laser treatments, chemical peels, and anti-aging therapies. We use USFDA-approved equipment for all procedures.

faqs.question: Are aesthetic procedures painful?
faqs.answer: Most procedures involve minimal discomfort. Topical anesthetics are used when needed.

faqs.question: How many sessions of laser hair removal are needed?
faqs.answer: Typically 6-8 sessions spaced 4-6 weeks apart for optimal results.

faqs.question: Is there any downtime after procedures?
faqs.answer: Downtime varies by procedure. Non-invasive treatments have no downtime, while laser procedures may have 2-7 days of recovery.

doctors.name: Dr. Sophia Lee
doctors.specialization: Skin Cancer Diagnosis, Complex Skin Conditions
